# workos_redirect_uri (Resource)

Manages a WorkOS AuthKit redirect URI in the current WorkOS environment.

Redirect URIs are immutable in the WorkOS API. Changing `uri` forces Terraform
to replace the resource.

## Example Usage

```hcl
resource "workos_redirect_uri" "production_callback" {
  uri = "https://app.example.com/api/auth/callback"
}
```

## Import

AuthKit redirect URIs can be imported using their WorkOS ID:

```shell
terraform import workos_redirect_uri.example redirect_uri_01H00000000000000000000000
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "workos_redirect_uri" "production_callback" {
  uri = "https://app.example.com/api/auth/callback"
}

output "production_callback_redirect_uri_id" {
  value = workos_redirect_uri.production_callback.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uri` (String) The redirect URI. Changing this value forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the redirect URI was created (RFC3339 format).
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default redirect URI.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the AuthKit redirect URI.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the redirect URI was last updated (RFC3339 format).
